calendar.matters:
Joint Petition For Approval Of Settlement Agreement And Termination Of Trust Pursuant To Probate Code Sections 15403 And 15409
Off Calendar May-27-2022 Denied
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Edward Koplowitz and David Baer, via Zoom, for Leo Petroni, Petitioner; Daniel Bernhard, via Zoom, for Peter Petroni and Marco Petroni, Petitioners; Deb Fox, via Zoom, Guardian Ad Litem for any unascertained or unborn issue.

The court advises the parties of its position that the request to terminate the marital trust is moot due to Mary E. Petroni's death. The court advises the parties of its tentative ruling regarding the joint request to approve the settlement agreement and that the court is not in the position to be involved in the dispute. Messrs. Baer and Koplowitz presented oral argument to support their positions with regard to the petition for approval of settlement agreement and termination of trust. The court reiterates its position and mentions that it appears that the settlement agreement is much too broad for it to be approved. The court confirms that venue is not an issue.

After additional discussion, the matter is taken under submission.

Judge: Hon. Joseph Quinn. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Bastain. Not Reported.

Joint Petition For Approval Of Settlement Agreement And Termination Of Trust Pursuant To Probate Code Sections 15403 And 15409
Off Calendar Apr-20-2022 Continued To May-24-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Joint Petition For Approval Of Settlement Agreement And Termination Of Trust Pursuant To Probate Code Sections 15403 And 15409
Off Calendar Mar-22-2022 Continued To Apr-20-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
